package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinEngineAsGlobalSingleton() string {
    ruleID := "gin_engine_as_global_singleton"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Package-level `*gin.Engine` singletons reused across unrelated startup paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
